overview.description: The Invesco DB US Dollar Index Bullish Fund (UUP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long usd, short g10 basket currency. The fund tracks the changes in value of the US dollar relative to a basket of world currencies via USDX future contracts. UUP was launched on Feb 20, 2007 and is issued by Invesco.
